code:
sequenceDiagram
actor Dev
participant GitHub
participant Runner
Dev->>GitHub: triggers "Docker Build and Push"
GitHub->>Runner: dispatch
loop Docker Build and Push
Runner->>Runner: job build-and-push
Runner-->>Runner: Checkout code
Runner-->>Runner: Set up Docker Buildx
Runner-->>Runner: Log in to Container Registry
Runner-->>Runner: Extract metadata
Runner-->>Runner: Build and push Docker image
Runner-->>Runner: Test Docker image
end
Dev->>GitHub: triggers "Codebase Mindmap"
GitHub->>Runner: dispatch
loop Codebase Mindmap
Runner->>Runner: job build
Runner-->>Runner: Checkout
Runner-->>Runner: Setup Node.js
Runner-->>Runner: Install markmap-cli
Runner-->>Runner: Generate Markdown map
Runner-->>Runner: Build Markmap HTML
Runner-->>Runner: Upload artifact (Education_StudentDB)
Runner-->>Runner: Upload Pages artifact
Runner->>Runner: job deploy
Runner-->>Runner: Deploy to GitHub Pages
end
Dev->>GitHub: triggers "PR Validation"
GitHub->>Runner: dispatch
loop PR Validation
Runner->>Runner: job validate-pr
Runner-->>Runner: Checkout code
Runner-->>Runner: Install PyYAML
Runner-->>Runner: Validate YAML files
Runner-->>Runner: Validate Shell Scripts
end
Dev->>GitHub: triggers "Security Scanning"
GitHub->>Runner: dispatch
loop Security Scanning
Runner->>Runner: job trivy-scan
Runner-->>Runner: Checkout code
Runner-->>Runner: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner in repo mode
Runner-->>Runner: Upload Trivy results to GitHub Security
Runner->>Runner: job docker-scan
Runner-->>Runner: Checkout code
Runner-->>Runner: Build Docker image
Runner-->>Runner: Run Trivy on Docker image
Runner-->>Runner: Upload Docker scan results
Runner->>Runner: job secret-scan
Runner-->>Runner: Checkout code
Runner-->>Runner: TruffleHog OSS
end
repo_description: AegisNet: An advanced, integrated defense solution leveraging AI, autonomous drones, and advanced detection systems for comprehensive situational awareness and security.

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个完整的GitHub Actions工作流图，展示我们Education_StudentDB项目的CI/CD流程。核心是从开发者触发到Runner执行的完整链路，包含四个主要工作流：Docker构建推送、代码库思维导图生成、PR验证和安全扫描。
明白了。四个工作流都是Dev通过GitHub触发，然后dispatch到Runner执行对吗？另外安全扫描看起来比较复杂，我看到有trivy-scan、docker-scan和secret-scan三个job，需要详细展开吗？
对的，所有工作流都是这个模式。安全扫描确实要展开三个并行job：Trivy仓库扫描、Docker镜像扫描、还有TruffleHog密钥扫描。另外思维导图那个工作流最后要部署到GitHub Pages，记得把deploy job也画出来。

好的，我先画出主干结构。Dev触发四个工作流，每个都是GitHub dispatch到Runner。Docker Build and Push里我放了build-and-push job，包含Checkout code、Set up Docker Buildx、Log in to Container Registry、Extract metadata、Build and push、Test这些步骤。
Docker那个没问题。思维导图工作流你注意一下，它有两个job：build和deploy。build里面要生成Markmap HTML，然后上传两个artifact，其中一个明确标注Education_StudentDB名称，最后deploy job部署到Pages。
已更新。思维导图的build job我画了Setup Node.js、Install markmap-cli、Generate Markdown map、Build Markmap HTML，然后两个Upload步骤，deploy job做Deploy to GitHub Pages。PR验证工作流比较简单，validate-pr job做YAML和Shell脚本校验，需要PyYAML。
PR验证那里漏了一个步骤，validate-pr job在Install PyYAML之后，要先Checkout code，然后才是Validate YAML files和Validate Shell Scripts。另外安全扫描的secret-scan job，工具名称是TruffleHog OSS，不是简单的secret scan。

已修正。PR Validation的validate-pr现在顺序是Checkout code → Install PyYAML → Validate YAML files → Validate Shell Scripts。安全扫描三个job都补全了：trivy-scan做仓库扫描并上传结果到GitHub Security，docker-scan先Build Docker image再扫描上传，secret-scan用TruffleHog OSS。
完美，这个结构清晰多了。四个工作流独立触发，Runner内部用loop包裹各自的任务流，安全扫描的三重防护机制也体现出来了。可以定稿了。
